title: Sales Manager
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

SEKISUI SINGAPORE PTE. LTD. is owned by SEKISUI CHEMICAL Co., Ltd., which is headquartered in Osaka and Tokyo Japan. SEKISUI CHEMICAL Co., Ltd. was established in 1947 and, in recent years, has become one of the world’s leading infrastructure companies. The main business of Sekisui Singapore Pte Ltd is the Sales of Sekisui Chemical products such as Industrial piping system products, Pipe rehabilitation products, etc. to Southeast Asia.

Job Summary

Sekisui Singapore Pte Ltd (SSP) seeks a self-motivated and results-driven Sales Manager to lead the unit’s activities, develop and implement effective business strategies, and drive commercial success in the Southeast Asia region.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the Business Unit to deliver commercial results, manage personnel, and leverage data insights to optimize performance
  • Ensure operational execution meets or exceeds client standards consistently
  • Establish and nurture strong partnerships with distributors to enhance brand engagement and increase regional sell-through
  • Collaborate with partners to develop and implement strategic initiatives that capitalize on key growth opportunities in the region
  • Build, maintain, and expand strong relationships with clients, internal stakeholders, and relevant departments to support business objectives
  • Manage sales personnel effectively to achieve team targets and foster a high-performance culture
  • Analyze market trends and business financial information to inform decision-making and strategy development
  • Communicate clearly and persuasively with internal and external stakeholders to drive alignment and business growth

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Proven experience of 5 to 10 years in sales within the piping systems industry
  • Proficiency in English communication, both written and oral, to engage diverse stakeholders effectively
  • Skilled in using standard processing software to support sales operations
  • Detail-oriented approach to managing sales processes and customer relationships
  • Results-driven mindset focused on achieving and exceeding sales targets
  • Strong analytical skills to interpret data and market insights for strategic advantage
  • Commercial acumen to understand business drivers and financial impacts
  • Networking and influencing skills to build partnerships and drive collaboration
  • Resilience and innovative thinking to overcome challenges and identify new opportunities
  • Diploma or Degree in Engineering, Business Administration, or equivalent
  • Experience in sales operations within the industrial piping channel is advantageous
